race.comment: FLAMING RONDA (7) couldn't have been more impressive when bolting in at Geraldton as the $1.55 fav. Tougher here, but she looks a progressive type and she won a Belmont trial before the fresh win. Looks up to this and with further improvement expected, she makes plenty of appeal. OCTOBER ROX (9) stepped up to this company last time out and help his own, beaten 2.8L as a $13 chance. Showed he was up to this level there and the visors replace the blinkers. Should get every chance to make his presence felt. NICKELPLAY (5) hasn't been far away in recent efforts and is knocking on the door of a drought breaking win. Wide draw is the query, but she does have some early speed and Steve Parnham knows her well. Can play a leading role. TRAILER TRUCK (2) got the job done in a photo finish last start with Nottle on board. Progressing nicely and can raise the bar again. SETAGAYA (10) is next best.
